name: C-3 manifest envelope includes the rubric_state block per §2.8 schema
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out m.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.rubric_state&&Array.isArray(j.rubric_state.rules_evaluated)?0:1)' && echo block 1>&2
